title: 有馬記念の後に・まさかの二強超え

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I just... I can't believe it...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I beat Tamtam and Oguri!
choice_data_list: Now they see your true strength.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Gosh! You're praising me way too much!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I'm really glad that I could finish things like
this.

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Staff Member A
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek, it's time for your post-race
interview. This way, please!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Um... Thank you very much for coming to our race
today.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
My cheekiness has caused my trainer a lot of
trouble over the past year.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I believe that those trials have helped us both
to grow.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Super Creek, what's your next goal?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Umm, I'll have to discuss that with my trainer, but
I'd love to try for the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We still have a lot to learn, but we hope you'll all
be here to support us next year as well.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: The heck's with all the ceremony?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Geez, I can't stand it. Ya feel me, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I s'pose we can give her this one. The real
battle is only just beginnin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Don't you say it. I don't wanna hear nothin'
about you bein' hungry, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even amidst the year-end chaos, Super Creek has
the best day ever.
